snippet.title: Season 2 Cinematic Trailer | Marathon

Featuring a new map with Night Marsh, a new Runner shell Sentinel, the Cradle, new weapons, progression improvements, and more.

snippet.title: 007 FIRST LIGHT Walkthrough Gameplay Part 1 - INTRO (FULL GAME)
snippet.description:
Learn more about DLSS 4.5 in 007 First Light here: https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/geforce/campaigns/007-first-light-geforce-rtx-50-series-bundle/
Thanks Nvidia GeForce for sponsoring this 007 First Light Gameplay! #RTXON

007 First Light Walkthrough Gameplay Part 1 includes a Full Game Review and Full Gameplay on PlayStation 5 Pro (PS5 Pro), Xbox Series X/S, PC (Steam) and Nintendo Switch 2 later in 2026. snippet.title: Hammer's Dracula | Official Teaser Trailer | The Cut The Censors Tried To Bury
snippet.description:
The Count is coming, and he's bringing long-lost footage unseen for over 60 years.

This October, Peter Cushing and Christopher Lee are together again as Hammer's original Dracula returns to cinemas and makes its worldwide home entertainment debut in stunning 4K.

Painstakingly restored in 4K from the best original archival materials sourced from around the world, Dracula (1958) returns in its most complete form ever presented. For the first time outside of Japan's original 1958 theatrical release, footage believed lost for over six decades has been meticulously restored and reintegrated into the film. This footage has never been released in the UK or the US, and has never been seen on home entertainment anywhere in the world.

This is the cut the censors tried to bury.

The Count awaits. Sign up for updates at hammerfilms.com/dracula

The legacy lives on. Subscribe now.

🧛‍♂️Facebook: /hammerfilms

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.title: Bruno Mars - Risk It All [Live From The Romantic Tour]
snippet.description:
Bruno Mars - Risk It All [Live From The Romantic Tour]

The Romantic – the new album from Bruno Mars, available now. Listen now: https://brunomars.lnk.to/TheRomantic

Lyrics: 
For just a chance to win your heart
you could set the bar
beyond the stars
I’ll do anything anything you ask me to

Say you want the moon watch me learn to fly
Ain't a mountain you could point to i wouldn’t climb
It's crazy but it’s true. There’s nothing I won't do. 
I’d risk it all for you

To hold your hand and call you mine
I’m trynna be your man
til the end of time
oh i’ll do anything, anything you ask me to

I would run through the fire just to be by your side
if your heart’s on the line you could take mine
It's crazy but it’s true. There's nothing I won’t do. 
I'd risk it all for you

I would swim across the sea just to show you
sacrifice my life just to hold you
I could go on and on to prove that you belong
here in my arms

Say you want the moon watch me, learn to fly
ain’t a mountain you could point to I wouldn’t climb

It's crazy but it’s true. There's nothing I won’t do
I’d risk it all for you (2x)

Join Bruno’s mailing list: https://drop.cobrand.com/d/BrunoMars/Subscribe

Shop Bruno’s official store: https://brunomars.lnk.to/officialstore

https://www.tiktok.com/@brunomars
https://www.instagram.com/brunomars
https://www.youtube.com/brunomars
https://x.com/brunomars
https://www.facebook.com/brunomars

https://brunomars.com

Bruno Mars is a 16x GRAMMY®-winning global superstar, singer, songwriter, multi-instrumentalist, producer, and one of the most-streamed artists in the world. Known for his showmanship and chart-toppers, Bruno has set a number of records throughout his career, including becoming the first artist ever to hit 150 million monthly listeners on Spotify, appearing on two of the fastest songs to reach one billion streams (for “Die with a Smile” with Lady Gaga and “APT.” with ROSÉ, and achieving the highest-certified song in RIAA history with 2010’s “Just the Way You Are”). Since launching a string of hits beginning in 2009, Bruno has sold over 150 million records worldwide, making him one of the best-selling artists of all time. Beyond his work as a soloist, Bruno is a member of the duo Silk Sonic with Anderson .Paak. In addition to his 35 Billboard Hot 100 hits, including nine number one singles, Bruno is the recipient of 16 GRAMMY® Awards (including “Album of the Year” for 24K Magic), 14 American Music Awards, and seven MTV Video Music Awards. His 24K Magic World Tour was among the highest-grossing tours in history, and within the top ten highest-grossing of the 2010s.

#BrunoMars #RiskItAll #TheRomanticTour

💘 Cand doi oameni se iubesc pe bune… se simte din prima.
„EU TE VREAU” este cea mai noua manea moderna de dragoste din 2026 de balans si club, cu un refren care intra instant in cap si o energie care te face sa o pui pe repeat.

⚡ „Eu te eu te eu te vreau…”
👉 genul ala de hook viral care ramane blocat in minte din prima ascultare.

💃 „Mai aproape, vino mai aproape…”
este exact genul ala de pre-chorus care aprinde boxele in masina, club sau la petreceri.

snippet.title: F1 25: 2026 Season Pack Features Deep Dive
snippet.description:
Rewrite the Grid when the 2026 Season Pack for EA SPORTS™ F1® 25 launches worldwide on June 3, 2026. Wishlist now: https://x.ea.com/89231

Wishlist the F1® 25: 2026 Season Pack on Xbox Series X|S, Steam, and EA Play.

In this deep dive, you'll learn all about the groundbreaking new era of F1® and the 2026 rules and regulations. 

Get ready for action-packed racing as you tactically use the new Overtake mode and active aerodynamics to outsmart the grid and propel yourself to victory. 

Master the new MADRING circuit and forge your racing legacy to fight for Championship Glory in Career mode, or take control of your own team and become the 12th team on the grid in My Team, where you can customize your car and line up alongside new teams, Audi and Cadillac. 

Jump into the 2026 Season across Driver Career, My Team, Grand Prix™, Time Trial, Split-Screen, and Unranked Multiplayer modes. In Driver Career and My Team, start a new 2026 save to get the latest teams, drivers, rules, fresh Objectives, and an updated Calendar featuring the new Spanish Grand Prix™. In My Team, your custom squad will now be the twelfth on the grid, as the official grid expands to eleven teams in 2026.

Follow all the EA SPORTS F1 social channels 👉 https://linktr.ee/easportsf1

https://x.com/EASPORTSF1

https://www.instagram.com/EASPORTSF1

#F125SeasonPack #f125

snippet.title: I recommend: 007 First Light (Review)
snippet.description:
Nvidia 50-series GPUs deliver cutting edge performance as well as advanced features like DLSS 4.5, Path Tracing and more. --
'007 First Light' isn't as elegantly put together as its leading man but it nails the fundamentals, delivering a satisfying spy thriller that Bond fans are almost sure to enjoy.
